_comment: The abstract protocol neighbors rely on: an open order settles exactly once (paid, declined, or cancelled) and ships only after payment.

_ignores.ship: not yet paid; shipping an unpaid order is the delegated invariant no-ship-without-capture

_ignores.markDeclined: stale message after settlement; deduped by Payment.id
_ignores.cancel: cancellation after payment is out of the contract; a refund flow would extend it
